title: Start of 333 XX
wikitext:
[]: Start of 3.33 XX             Quote Post by Craftee » Sun Mar 23, 2014 4:15 am Nothing on the web about this, but in the beginning of 3.33 theres this image any clues? SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Sun Mar 23, 2014 4:23 am I'm not sure what the proper terminology is but it's just a stamp to emulate that old film reel effect AFAIK.

[]:             Quote Post by Craftee » Sun Mar 23, 2014 4:24 am but the XX is so uniform. no imperfections you would see on film.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Mar 23, 2014 5:23 am Where exactly is that shot?

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Sun Mar 23, 2014 5:59 am Two seconds in going by UTW-Thora BD rip.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Mar 23, 2014 7:34 am Technically that’s part of the “God Warrior” short film, so I wouldn’t consider it as having anything to do with the Eva movie that followed. Unless, of course, the Naussica universe is the NTE Eva universe well into the future. (I’m surprised that no theories explaining how the world of Nausicaa is tied to the world of Evangelion. I mean, Anno even playfully considers the idea in an extremely loose way.)

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Mar 23, 2014 11:26 am It's just an old film stamp. Probably nothing to it- kinda like the tree of life in the concert hall.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Mar 23, 2014 11:53 am The "tree of life" is an actual artifact of the process. This is done deliberately as an immitation of ye olde ways just for shits and giggles on Anno's part. It's just part of the transition between God Warrior and Q as if you were still in a double feature. The full sequence is: God Warrior end credits, artificially grainy and with pretend film shake. This frame: http://i.minus.com/i4x3kerb4lv5V.png This frame: http://i.minus.com/iuwDgxJvoOstO.png Then a lot of grimey and dirty black frames: http://i.minus.com/iHra9gbYdxkKz.png Double XX: http://i.minus.com/iLJIOazhT9bV1.png More dirty black frames: http://i.minus.com/ilnJyF36aufnL.png Deliberately dirty Eirin number: http://i.minus.com/iudd0990umsYd.png Deliberately dirty Toei logo: http://i.minus.com/iEQdHXhBjjWAG.png T-Joy logo Khara logo Q actually starts with Operation US. At first it's a grainy, shakey shot trying to fix itself on Pod 2' (if you've ever seen a missle launch/test with a PTZ camera trying to follow it this is what Anno likely wanted) until you finally transition to the clear digital look. This is just Anno messing around pretending there's still celluloid involved when in fact most aspects of creation, and by the time of Q, projection is already digital.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Mar 23, 2014 2:44 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: as if you were still in a double feature.
